name: Baroness Bank Mower
description: Specialist self-propelled bank mower for steep gradients, embankments, and difficult terrain that conventional mowers cannot access.

name: Chapter 8 Flatbed
description: Fully Chapter 8-compliant flatbed vehicle with high-visibility chevrons, beacon bars, and onboard tool storage for highway and roadside works.

name: Chapter 8 4x4
description: All-terrain 4x4 equipped to Chapter 8 standard for accessing remote and off-road infrastructure sites in all conditions.

name: Plant Trailer
description: Heavy-duty trailer for transporting specialist equipment, plant, and materials between sites efficiently.

name: Chainsaws
description: Professional-grade chainsaws maintained to manufacturer specification, operated exclusively by NPTC-qualified personnel.

name: Brush Cutters & Strimmers
description: Commercial brush cutters and strimmers for heavy-duty vegetation clearance and grounds maintenance operations.

name: Hedge Cutters
description: Professional hedge cutting equipment for boundary, estate, and highway hedge maintenance programmes.

name: Blowers
description: Commercial blowers for site clearance, debris management, and grounds maintenance finishing operations.

name: Full Grounds Maintenance Kit
description: Complete commercial grounds maintenance equipment set for estate-wide mowing, edging, and grounds care programmes.

name: Electric Sprayers
description: Electric spraying equipment for precise herbicide application by PA1/PA6 qualified operatives in vegetation management programmes.

name: Water Safety Equipment
description: Life jackets, throw lines, and water rescue equipment for all operations in and around watercourses, carried by Water Safety Level 2 trained teams.

name: Fencing Tools
description: Complete fencing installation toolkit for security, boundary, and stock fencing work across all site types.
